channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Publishers can’t control AI answers. They can’t ignore them either
item.description: Stop me if you’ve heard this one: Google’s AI Overviews are sometimes wrong. This has been a perennial complaint about the Gemini-written summaries that appear at the top of search results since their debut in mid 2024. It also happens to be true.
item.dc:creator: Pete Pachal, Fast Company

item.title: SnapLogic MCP Builder eases creation of MCP servers
item.description: SnapLogic has released MCP Builder, a template-based tool designed to help organizations operationalize AI faster by turning existing integration pipelines into agent-ready Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Zoning authority could be the answer to data center woes, as San Marcos becomes the first Texas city to ban data centers
item.description: Zoning laws could help ban data centers in Texas cities, but there is state legislation that might get in the way
item.dc:creator: Benedict Collins, TechRadar

item.title: AWS aims to lower log analytics costs with new analytics engine for managed OpenSearch
item.description: AWS is offering to help enterprises address the growing cost of retaining telemetry for talkative AI applications with a new engine for its managed Amazon OpenSearch Service optimized for log analytics, which it claims can reduce storage costs by 70% and at the same time deliver better price-perform
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: UBTech launched its first full-size Ultra-Bionic humanoid robot, but what it really wants to do is make robot replicas of loved ones
item.description: UBTech's new UWorld U1 Series robot is its first fully humanoid bot, and it could eventually be configured to look like a lost loved one — if that's your thing.
item.dc:creator: Lance Ulanoff, TechRadar

item.title: How to watch Belgium vs Senegal: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time for FIFA World Cup 2026 as Kevin De Bruyne & Co. eye progress, team news
item.description: Jeremy Doku returns to the Belgium starting XI for their FIFA World Cup 2026 clash with Senegal. Here's how to watch the last-32 tie for free online and from anywhere.
item.dc:creator: James Roberts, TechRadar

item.title: How to avoid AI in as many places as possible
item.description: It’s not easy wanting nothing to do with AI these days. As a tech advice journalist, I’ve heard from plenty of folks who were perfectly happy with how their apps and operating systems worked before the artificial intelligence boom.
item.dc:creator: Jared Newman, Fast Company

item.title: Windscribe trolls Mullvad's political donation crisis with a 'scandal' of its own
item.description: Following the revelation that a Mullvad co-founder donated $500,000 to a populist political party, rival provider Windscribe has issued a parody statement "coming clean" about its own CEO's donations, to local dog and cat rescues.
item.dc:creator: Rene Millman, TechRadar

item.title: 5 takeaways from Anthropic’s big science event
item.description: Even compared to most CEOs of AI companies, Anthropic cofounder and CEO Dario Amodei is known for making jaw-dropping predictions.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft unveils Memora to tackle AI agents’ memory problem
item.description: With AI agents increasingly expected to remember conversations, preferences, and decisions over extended periods, Microsoft Research has developed Memora, a memory system designed to provide more scalable and reliable long-term recall than existing approaches.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: FBI warns Microsoft users about passwordless scam
item.description: The FBI warns about Kali365, a phishing scam targeting Microsoft 365 accounts that can bypass multifactor authentication using device code tricks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cyberattacks pose a ‘threat to life’ in Australia
item.description: Australia’s Security Intelligence Organization (ASIO) has uncovered an attack on a critical infrastructure operator’s network. State-sponsored actors had compromised the network and were preparing to sabotage it, according to its director general, Mike Burgess.
item.dc:creator: Computer World
